generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical component of the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component of the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing state data from physical lab-scale gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control for motion planning decisions"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational metrics"
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for air quality management exemplar"
]

instance ModelFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation of model fidelity"
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version control for development process"
]

instance VirusSpreadSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation for virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for decision support"
]

instance BehavioralAdaptationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation for real-time system adjustments in GreenhouseDT"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of motion planning",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data logging of operational metrics",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time data visualization",
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of model fidelity",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelFidelityInsight
]

instance DevelopmentProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control and development process management",
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance LoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for logging crane state data to TimescaleDB database",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for visualizing digital twin architecture using C4 model",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub used for version control in digital twin development",
    DTDFVocab:enables DevelopmentProcessService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model for architecture visualization using context and container diagrams",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ModelDrivenMethodology : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Driven digital twin engineering methodology for Air Quality Management exemplar"
]

instance TimescaleDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database storing crane operational metrics",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingEnabler
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, Controller
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) transmits control commands via the Physical Crane Interface to the Physical Crane, with operator inputs processed through the Human Machine Interface (HMI)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system's architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, as applied to the lab scale gantry crane system described in the documents."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services within the digital twin communicate via an MQTT Broker for signaling, and TimescaleDB serves as the central data storage."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin pipeline implementation and utilization of the AutomationML standard for interoperability in indoor air quality management applications."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar complies with AutomationML standards for digital twin modeling. Other exemplars use ad-hoc approaches without specified compliance to industry standards or interoperability frameworks."
]
